title: Spoon Rest for Kitchen, Ceramic Spoon Rest for Stove Top, Spoon Holder Set of 4 Kitchen Counter Coffee 4.8 Inches Heat Resistant Utensil Rest for Countertop, Tea Bag Holder Dish, Dishwasher Safe
seller_info_text: Yi Wu Shi Pan Bing Dian Zi Shang Wu Shang Hang
features: 【4 Pack Ceramic Spoon Rest】 Dimensions 4.8” W x 1” H. Each rest has different pattern. Keep your stove top and kitchen counter clean with this stylish ceramic spoon rest, designed to hold your cooking utensils during food prep.
【Quality Material】 This stove spoon rest is made of high-quality ceramic, with no odor, good heat resistance, and durability. It can be safely used in the dishwasher/oven/microwave/refrigerator.
【Fashion Style】 This spoon holder kitchen rest features an elegant modern design, with each color being different, and its unique edge design complements any kitchen decor.

【Easy to Clean】Since this kitchen spoon rest is made of high quality ceramic, the smooth surface can be wiped clean with a damp cloth or put into the dishwasher for cleaning, making it very easy to maintain.

【Suitable for Any Occasion】Whether you use it for holding soup spoons, coffee spoons, teaspoons, knives and forks, chopsticks, or as a tool for cooking, baking, or serving, a ceramic spoon rest is the perfect accessory for your kitchen. You can also give the spoon rest set as a gift to your family, friends, or baking enthusiasts.
